title: Mordaine's Ledger, Page 37
source: A weathered account book, left open on the desk at the Harmonia inn.
pages: Party 37 — the cave expedition. Expected losses: 4. Actual losses: 4. As expected. Funds recovered from estates: 12 gold. Insurance premium paid out: 0. Net: positive.
The cave does not return anyone. It has not returned anyone in six years. The arrangement is understood by everyone involved, including, one assumes, the cave.
Party 38 has signed up for tomorrow. I have raised the premium to 8 gold per head. They did not negotiate. Nobody ever does.
